news.headline: Traders mint money on betting platforms on US-Israel strike on Iran
news.summary: Anonymous bets hours before attacks on Iran that killed Supreme Leader Khamenei have raised concerns of insider trading.

news.headline: US will ‘rain missiles’, ‘death and destruction’ on Iran, Trump aides say
news.summary: US president says on a scale of one to 10, he would rate the war's success at 15, as Iran details civilian sites hit.

news.headline: UAE oil depot fire still raging day after drone sparks blaze
news.summary: A fire is still raging at an oil depot in Fujairah, UAE a day after falling debris from a drone ignited the blaze.

news.headline: More than 200 killed in landslide at DRC coltan mine
news.summary: Congo’s Mines Ministry said about 70 children were among the victims.

news.headline: US Senate rejects bid to curb Trump’s Iran war powers as Pentagon set to increase attacks
news.summary:
A bipartisan resolution that would block US President Donald Trump from launching further strikes on Iran failed to pass the Senate floor on Wednesday, as the Pentagon pledged to “accelerate” its actions in a war that’s “just getting started”.

news.headline: US Senate vote fails to rein in Trump war powers on Iran
news.summary: The measure, passed largely along party lines, would halt US military action until approved by Congress.

news.headline: US lawmakers vote to subpoena Pam Bondi over Epstein files
news.summary:
The House Oversight Committee voted on Wednesday to subpoena US Attorney General Pam Bondi to answer questions over the Justice Department’s handling of files regarding the Jeffrey Epstein sex-trafficking investigation.
